const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"curl --fail --location --silent --show-error 'https://www.supremecourt.gov/DocketPDF/25/25-1258/408134/20260506112442599_scan_ajimenez_2026-05-06-10-54-51.pdf' --output /tmp/gomez-petition.pdf && file /tmp/gomez-petition.pdf && command -v pdftotext && command -v pdftoppm && command -v tesseract","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"for tool in pdftotext pdftoppm tesseract ocrmypdf mutool gs magick; do if command -v \"$tool\" >/dev/null; then command -v \"$tool\"; fi; done","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run python -c \"import importlib.util; print({name: bool(importlib.util.find_spec(name)) for name in ['pypdf','PyPDF2','fitz','pdf2image','pytesseract','PIL']})\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pymupdf python -c \"import fitz; d=fitz.open('/tmp/gomez-petition.pdf'); [p.get_pixmap(matrix=fitz.Matrix(1.8,1.8),alpha=False).save(f'/tmp/gomez-page-{i+1}.png') for i,p in enumerate(d[:10])]; print(len(d))\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
